meaning: n.巨人,大力士,巨大的动物或植物,伟人,天才adj.庞大的,巨大的
examples: He's a giant of a man.
He looks scary but he's really a gentle giant.
They were standing on top of a giant scaffold.
Mr Alexander's new pay package was approved by Thames Water's parent company, German utility giant RWE.
And so Darfur's camps have become giant prisons, holding almost two million people now.
